text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hang in there, 'kay? You can always come back
to me if that's still bugging you later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Next, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day. But for some reason,
Mejiro Palmer is dealing with an entire queue of
people wanting to consult her for advice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um, hello Palmer. I was hoping to receive some
guidance from you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
An urge to give Ikuno chocolate has been
growing within me recently. I was wondering if
you could advise me on how to go about doing
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You wanna give Ikuno Dictus chocolate, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Ikuno... She's pretty serious and people even call
her an "ironclad girl," but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(It's not like she's unfriendly or anything. She
should pick up on McQueen's feelings just fine.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Why not just give some to her? I'm sure she'll be
happy to receive them, and 'sides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The only way you can figure out if your vibes are
the real deal or not is by trying a bunch of
different things!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trying different things, hm? Very well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you. I knew I could count on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whew... My shoulders sure are stiff... And after
talking with so many people, how could they not
be? ♪
choice_data_list: What were you doing in the classroom?
What were you up to in the classroom?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I guess you could call it a Valentine's Q&A?
People are always coming to me for advice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I get seriously mobbed this time of year, though.
But, like, I can't exactly say no to someone in
need, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro Palmer has earned quite the
reputation in Tracen as someone who offers
judgment-free discussion and advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine with her helping out others, but what has
me concerned is...
choice_data_list:
Do you have anything weighing on your mind,
Palmer?

Do you have anything weighing on your mind,
Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Me? I'm the kinda gal who works things out
herself, especially for the small stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But... well, there is this one itty-bitty thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You would?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda a tricky situation... but since you're
offering, I guess I'll take you up on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer hesitantly begins talking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So, um, like... there's someone I wanna give
chocolate to, but if I do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, I just feel like our relationship... Or, like,
the distance and vibes between us... Yeah, it feels
like that'll all change if I do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it'd still be okay to give them
chocolate, despite all that? Like, if I just kinda
handed it over real casual-like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You don't think they'll be all like, "Oh, whoa, I
didn't know she thought this way about me!" and
things will just stay the same?
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's probably how it'll go.
Yeah, that's probably how it'll go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You promise? Like, no cap, that's what you really
think? Do you swear on your life and pinky
promise on it?
choice_data_list:
H-hey, calm down for a sec. I can't see into the
future, but it'll probably be fine?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... Lost myself for a sec. It's just, the last
thing I wanna do is to ruin my relationship with
this person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But if you think it'll be okay, then it probably
won't be a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So, like... here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Palmer pulls something out
from behind her back and holds it out to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's okay to give you these, yeah? You said
nothing would change.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So, I want you to have these and try some of
them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I actually wanted to be all like, "Wahey! ☆ Happy
Valentine's Day!" and whatever, but that would've
been way overboard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Sorry for being such a wimp... Will you
accept these?
choice_data_list: Of course I will. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept the neatly wrapped chocolates with a
smile.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't really ask for much. But whenever I have
stuff bugging me, just like I did now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Could you hear me out and give me advice again?
I don't really have anyone to talk to about tricky
little things like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh, you will? Ahaha... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Agh! My palms are, like, so sweaty! And my
knees? Weak! Dang, Valentine's Day is no joke.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She laughs with a shrug. It seems I was able to
help remove a huge weight off Mejiro Palmer's
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She laughs with a shrug. It seems I was able to
help remove a huge weight off Mejiro Palmer's
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, sooo... Since I already gave you chocolates
and everything, I was hoping you could come
somewhere with me on the way back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, I don't really ask for much! But if it's
okay with you...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Mejiro Palmer! Everyone says she's a total
love guru!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Really? Do you do consultations with fans like us,
too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Did word spread outside the academy
or something? Well, if it's just the two of you,
then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Army of Fans
text_block_list.text:
OHHHHH! PALMER! CAN YOU GIVE US SOME
ADVICE, PLEASE?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What in the what?! There's no way I can
talk to every single one of you! There goes my
Valentine's Day!
choice_data_list: Let's get away from here, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Get away?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is hesitant to leave, but I drag her
away from the crowd as fast as I can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Ouch, I've got a stitch in my side. Phew, I was really flat-out sprinting for a sec there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look at the view! It's so pretty out here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We really lucked out, ending up in a place like
this during our mad escape! Man, twilight is the
best! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer absolutely glows as she gazes
happily toward the setting sun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? I like being around lots of people,
but if things get way too crowded and
claustrophobic...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's run away from it all, just the two of us!
choice_data_list: But where would we run away to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, anywhere! It doesn't matter where we end
up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I bet it'd be fun to live on the road. If we could
really live free, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That'd be totes perfectly fine by me. There's
nothing else I need as long as I have someone to
talk with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess you could call this my Valentine's message
to you. Haha. Just kidding...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A warm gust of evening air comes through at that
moment, making Mejiro Palmer's hair dance on
the breeze.
